prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of Goldman Sachs stock, I applied a 22-day forecast model assuming approximately 25% annualized volatility (typical for large investment banks). Confidence intervals calculated using standard statistical methods: 22-day volatility of ~3.6%, with 50% CI at ±0.67 std dev, 80% CI at ±1.28 std dev, and 90% CI at ±1.64 std dev from current price.
